label: network_optimised
effect: enables up to 350 Gbps inter-VM bandwidth

label: no-hibernation
effect: cannot save VM state to disk; must keep running or destroy

label: no-snapshot
effect: no point-in-time backup capability; no snapshot-based cloning

label: local-storage-only
effect: must boot from local hypervisor storage; cannot boot from Ceph/shared volumes

label: no-reboot
effect: cannot hard-reboot via API or UI; use Stop+Start instead
